data.content: Implementation verified and pushed. Two commits on main: cac9268 adds interactionLog.logPrompt() calls in the else branches for both initial session and take-loop paths when dialect\!='claude' (Codex one-shot agents), so prompts passed as CLI args are now visible in history logs. 9946118 adds regression tests covering both initial prompt (source: initial) and take-loop prompt (source: take_2) logging for one-shot agents. All 1829 tests pass, typecheck clean.
